# Files to exclude from external Fallout tests
# Paths are relative to external/fallout/

# SSL files using macros with `else` continuation. These macros expand to
# `if...then begin...end`, so `else` after them is valid post-expansion.
# But the parser sees raw source where `else` follows an expression statement.

# check_forced_dialog macro
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/den/dcjoey.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/hubstash/hcguard2.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/modoc/mcvegeir.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/ncr/scdocjub.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/ncangbis.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/ncbisgrd.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/nccorbro.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/nclabish.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/ncpitbos.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/ncstulit.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/sanfran/fcplntmn.ssl

# start_tent_dialog macro
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/main/ahhakun.ssl

# anim_move_to_point_rate macro
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/nceldrid.ssl

# If_Companion_Needs_Healing macro
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/valtcity/vcdrtroy.ssl

# martin_sees_lockpick_block macro
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/valtcity/vivltdr3.ssl

# Comment inside parenthesized expression (formatter limitation)
sfall/artifacts/mods/gl_npcarmor.ssl

# Assignment without semicolon in macro body — nested case (grammar limitation).
# The C preprocessor pastes macro bodies verbatim, so a trailing `;` is optional.
# The grammar handles the simple case: `#define MACRO identifier := expression`
# (top-level final assignment). The remaining files use the nested case where the
# no-`;` assignment is inside an `if`/`else`/`while` branch:
# e.g. `#define M if (x) then obj := 0`
# Full support would require duplicating the statement grammar for macro context.
Fallout2_Party_Orders/source/gl_p_party_orders.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/den/dcrebdor.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/generic/ziblkjck.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/main/nhmyron.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/modoc/mcatkdog.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/modoc/mcbrahmn.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/modoc/mccornel.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/modoc/mcfarrel.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/modoc/mcladdie.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/modoc/mcprotec.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/modoc/mcrose.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/modoc/mcslag.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/ncbigjes.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/ncfluffe.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/ncpimp.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/ncprosti.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/nihscrat.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/redding/rtlndmin.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/sanfran/fctnkgmr.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/sanfran/fctnkmer.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/sanfran/fitguntb.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/sanfran/fitmertb.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/sierra/wtlndmin.ssl

# waypnt.ssl: no-`;` at macro ends (grammar limitation).
# `##` is supported in variable declarations, assignments, and expressions.
# Remaining blocker: final `variable_decl` without `;` (`variable lTime##x := 0`)
# and `return tile##x` without `;` nested inside an `if` body — same class as
# nested no-`;` assignment, which cannot complete the statement rule.
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/ncr/waypnt.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/vault13/waypnt.ssl

# Empty macro parameter list `()` (grammar limitation).
# `#define MACRO ()` — the grammar expects `commaSep($.identifier)` for params,
# so an empty `()` produces a MISSING identifier error.
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/template/genffld.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/template/sprtrp0.ssl

# Source file bugs — pre-existing syntax errors in the original source.
# These constructs are invalid even for the sslc compiler.
# - ncftully.ssl: unbalanced parentheses in macro body (extra `)`)
# - ncnikki.ssl: `\\ ` (double backslash + space) used as line continuation — invalid;
#   the second `\` is treated as the start of the next line, not as a continuation
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/ncftully.ssl
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/newreno/ncnikki.ssl

# If_Companion_Needs_Healing macro — partial `if` condition at macro end (grammar limitation).
# The macro body ends with `if (unhealthy_members > 0)` — no `then` or body.
# The call site supplies `then ...`, so post-expansion it is valid. The parser
# sees a bare `if (condition)` with no `then`, which cannot complete the if_stmt rule.
Fallout2_Restoration_Project/scripts_src/brokhill/hcdoc.ssl

# sfall language extensions not yet supported by the grammar (grammar limitation).
# - gl_healing_skill_mod.ssl: `case VALUE: begin ... end` switch statement syntax
sfall/artifacts/example_mods/FirstAidDoctorRepairMod/gl_healing_skill_mod.ssl
